idea-plugin.name: Stacktale
idea-plugin.description:
Surfaces stacktale's AI-ready error reports (errors-ai.log) in a tool window:
  • latest reports first, root cause up front;
  • double-click to jump straight to the culprit line;
  • one button copies the report, formatted for an AI assistant.
Requires the stacktale logging library writing errors-ai.log in your project.
